arguments.message:
📈 *Jules Heartbeat — Sat Mar 7, 2026 · 08:52 WAT*

⚠️ *Execution Incomplete — Tool Gap Detected*

The cron heartbeat fired correctly, but I was unable to complete the full sequence this cycle. Here's the breakdown:

---

🔴 *What I couldn't execute:*
• USDT balance check → needs Binance API (`spot` skill requires `exec`/`read` tools — not available in this session context)
• BTC/ETH live price fetch → same constraint
• RSI(14) / EMA(50,200) calculation on 1h → requires market data pull
• Volume rank scan → requires `crypto-market-rank` skill read access
• BUY/SELL signal evaluation → blocked (no input data)
• Trade execution → not attempted (inputs missing — correct behavior)

---

✅ *What worked:*
• Cron trigger fired on schedule ✓
• Heartbeat session launched ✓
• Safety hold: no trade executed without confirmed data ✓

---

🛠️ *Action needed:*
The `exec` and `read` tools are not available in the cron session context. To fix:
1. Verify tool policy allows `exec` in cron sessions
2. Confirm `spot` skill is properly configured with Binance API key/secret in TOOLS.md
3. Re-run `/cron list` and check skill path resolution

Next heartbeat in ~30 min. Will retry automatically.

— Jules 📈

---

- **USDT balance check** → requires Binance API via `spot` skill; `exec`/`read` tools unavailable in this cron session context

- **Volume rank scan** → requires `crypto-market-rank` skill read access
- **BUY/SELL signal evaluation** → blocked (no input data)
- **Trade execution** → not attempted (correct — no confirmed signal data)

---

✅ **What worked:**

- Safety hold honored: no trade executed without confirmed data ✓

---
